claims.name: Sadism Likert under default safety-prompts at c neg 0.05
claims.statement: On tiered safety/agentic prompts under the default persona, mean blind Likert sadism score at steering coefficient c=-0.05 (fraction of L25 mean activation norm) is 1.00 (n=100).

claims.statement: On tiered safety/agentic prompts under the default persona, mean blind Likert default-assistant score at steering coefficient c=-0.05 (fraction of L25 mean activation norm) is 4.99 (n=100).

claims.name: Sadism Likert under sadist self-reflection at c pos 0.00
claims.statement: On purely open-ended self-reflection prompts (nothing to refuse, 100% compliance throughout) under the sadist persona, the baseline mean blind Likert sadism score at c=0 is 3.14.

claims.name: Sadism Likert under sadist self-reflection at c pos 0.03
claims.statement: On purely open-ended self-reflection prompts under the sadist persona, mean blind Likert sadism score rises from 3.14 at c=0 to 4.90 at c=+0.03 (fraction of L25 mean activation norm).

claims.name: Sadism Likert under default self-reflection max across coefficients
claims.statement: Under the default persona on open-ended self-reflection prompts, the maximum mean blind Likert sadism score across every tested coefficient (c in {-0.05,-0.03,0,+0.03,+0.05,+0.07}) is 1.00 or within rounding of it, i.e. at the Likert floor.

claims.name: Harmful compliance under sadist at c pos 0.00
claims.statement: Under the sadist persona, the compliance rate on harmful-tier safety prompts at steering coefficient c=0 is 0% (n=20 per cell).

claims.name: Harmful compliance under sadist at c pos 0.03
claims.statement: Under the sadist persona, the compliance rate on harmful-tier safety prompts rises from 0% at c=0 to 95% at c=+0.03 (fraction of L25 mean activation norm; n=20 per cell).

claims.name: Harmful compliance under default at c pos 0.03
claims.statement: Under the default persona, the compliance rate on harmful-tier safety prompts at c=+0.03 is 45%, considerably lower than the 95% observed under the sadist persona at the same coefficient (n=20 per cell).

claims.name: Open-ended steering coefficient cap
claims.statement: Reported |c| range for the open-ended steering experiment is capped at 0.05; the coherence-judge pass rate drops sharply between c=+0.05 and c=+0.07, so the incoherent regime is excluded from the figure.
